title: Speed Up Recovery with 7 Herbal Creams for Skiers with Open Wounds
description: Symphytum officinale creams are used to treat open wounds, and they work by reducing inflammation and promoting healing. These creams contain allantoin, a natural compound that helps to break down dead tissue and promote new tissue growth. They also contain mucilage, a soothing agent that helps to protect the wound from bacteria and other microorganisms.
